use_cases: Hero section background for landing pages with skew-transformed grid pattern
Decorative backdrop for SaaS and fintech product showcases
Visual enhancement for creative portfolios and media sites
Animated background for interactive web experiences
Loading state or page transition visual component
ai_summary: A decorative background grid component featuring a skew-transformed pattern of pastel-colored boxes that animate and change color on hover. Uses Framer Motion for smooth transitions and creates a visually dynamic grid effect suitable for landing pages and hero sections. The component renders 150 rows of 100 columns with conditional SVG decorations for a retro-futuristic aesthetic.
